nasb.text: Now Ahab had seventy sons in Samaria. And Jehu wrote letters and sent them to Samaria, to the rulers of Jezreel, the elders, and to the guardians of the children of Ahab, saying,

esv.text: Now Ahab had seventy sons in Samaria. So Jehu wrote letters and sent them to Samaria, to the rulers of the city, to the elders, and to the guardians of the sons of Ahab, saying,

cnv.text: 亞哈有七十個兒子在撒瑪利亞。耶戶寫了一批信，送到撒瑪利亞，對耶斯列的首領、長老和亞哈眾子的導師說：

ccb.text: 亚哈在撒玛利亚有七十个子孙。耶户写信给那里的首领、长老以及亚哈子孙的监护人，说：
